linting.notes: Go linting tools (fmt, vet) are part of the standard Go toolchain. YAML linting uses yamllint with custom config that sets line-length warnings at 80 chars. gosec performs security scanning and outputs SARIF format. Note: controller-gen and gosec require Go 1.25+ but project uses Go 1.23; use GOTOOLCHAIN=auto to allow automatic Go version switching.

env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - set by envtest setup, points to kubebuilder test binaries
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for mock Kubernetes API server; tests create mock resources programmatically
testing.notes: Tests use controller-runtime envtest framework to simulate Kubernetes. Tests require GOTOOLCHAIN=auto because controller-gen v0.20.0 requires Go 1.25+. The test suite includes unit tests and controller integration tests. One test failure observed due to missing python in container (test validates error handling for missing deps). Smoke tests in tests/smoke/ require Kind cluster. E2E tests in tests/ require OpenShift cluster and are containerized.

ci.notes: All workflows trigger on push and pull_request. Security scans (gosec, trivy) also run on PR to main/incubation/stable branches. Smoke tests create a Kind cluster, build operator image, deploy CRDs, and run basic validation. Sync workflows exist for branch synchronization.

build.notes: Build requires code generation steps (make manifests generate) which use controller-gen v0.20.0. This tool requires Go 1.25+ so GOTOOLCHAIN=auto is needed. The build produces bin/manager binary. Docker/Podman images can be built with 'make docker-build'.

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD: Describe/Context/It blocks; standard Go: Test* functions
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports: stdlib, external, internal; uses goimports style
conventions.notes: Kubernetes operator following kubebuilder conventions. Controllers in controllers/ directory, APIs in api/ directory. Each controller has its own package with suite_test.go for test setup.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl yamllint

lint_commands.notes: Passed - warnings only (line length, document-start), no errors
Passed - security scan completed, SARIF output generated

test_commands.notes: Mostly passed - 1 test failure due to missing python (test validates error handling). All controller tests passed: evalhub (5 specs), gorch (5 specs), lmes (validation), nemo_guardrails (5 specs), tas (43 specs). Total runtime ~120 seconds.

container_recipe.notes: GOTOOLCHAIN=auto is critical - without it, controller-gen v0.20.0 and gosec fail because they require Go 1.25+. The toolchain env var allows Go to automatically download and use the required version for specific tools while keeping the main project at Go 1.23. Tests use envtest which downloads kubebuilder test binaries to bin/ directory.

results.notes: Reformatted 1 file, which is expected behavior

results.output_snippet: warnings about line length and missing document start
results.notes: Warnings only (not errors) - acceptable per .yamllint.yaml config

validation.summary: install OK, fmt OK (1 file reformatted), vet OK, yamllint OK (warnings only), gosec OK, build OK (68MB binary), tests MOSTLY OK (1 failure due to missing python in test environment - test validates error handling)

gaps: No golangci-lint configuration - project uses only go fmt and go vet for Go code linting
E2E tests in tests/ directory require OpenShift cluster and cannot be run in basic container
Smoke tests require Kind cluster with specific CRDs and are not runnable in simple container
One test failure due to missing python in container (Test_DownloadAssetsS3Error) - test expects specific error message
